title: 意志头盔 Wilhelm
subTitle: 哲学、阅读与数字生活｜密涅瓦的猫头鹰总在黄昏起飞
indexStyle: <style>body{max-width:960px;padding:42px 28px;line-height:1.65}#header{padding:12px 0 20px;margin-bottom:28px}.title-left .blogTitle{font-family:Georgia,'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:.02em}.avatar{width:58px;height:58px;border:2px solid var(--borderColor-muted);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.10)}#content>div:first-child{margin:0 0 24px!important;color:var(--fgColor-muted);font-family:Georgia,'Noto Serif SC',serif}.SideNav{min-width:0;border:0!important;display:grid;gap:12px}.SideNav-item{border:1px solid var(--borderColor-muted)!important;border-radius:14px!important;padding:18px 20px!important;background:var(--bgColor-default);transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease,border-color .18s ease}.SideNav-item:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:var(--borderColor-accent-emphasis)!important;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}@media(max-width:600px){body{padding:18px 14px}.blogTitle{display:block!important}.title-left .blogTitle{font-size:21px}.avatar{width:42px;height:42px}.SideNav-item{padding:15px!important}}</style>
style: <style>body{line-height:1.75}#postBody{font-size:17px}#postBody p{margin:1.1em 0}#postBody h2{margin-top:2.2em;padding-bottom:.35em}#postBody blockquote{border-left:4px solid var(--borderColor-accent-emphasis);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:10px 18px}#postBody img{border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.10)}#postBody pre{border-radius:10px}</style>
